headline: Kraft Heinz Taps Functional Hydration With Capri Sun Hydrate And Valuation Gap
summary: Kraft Heinz (NasdaqGS:KHC) has launched Capri Sun Hydrate, an electrolyte beverage for kids. The product targets the functional hydration category with a focus on low sugar and no artificial ingredients. Capri Sun Hydrate is rolling out nationwide across major retailers in the US. For Kraft Heinz, Capri Sun Hydrate extends a well known kids drink brand into the functional beverage category, an area that has drawn increasing consumer interest. summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-B) on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. headline: A Spill in the Snack Aisle Could Spell Dividend Cuts Ahead
summary: Conagra, Kraft Heinz, General Mills, and Campbell’s look most vulnerable to payout cuts, while names such as Tyson and Utz seem in better shape. Plus, a harsh reality for psychedelic stocks.
